market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Octagon Apartment Sleeps 4 with City Views
Skyline Views at The Octagon | 2-Bed Apartment
analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the best of the city from The Octagon, a 2-bedroom apartment with breathtaking skyline views. This entire home is perfectly located for exploring everything the city has to offer. With room for 4 guests, this apartment is ideal for friends and family looking to experience the urban buzz. The Octagon is a secure and well-maintained building with a 24/7 concierge team. Your hosts, Adam and his team, ensure that every guest has a fantastic stay. With 58 reviews and a 4.47 rating, you can be confident in the quality of your stay. Please note that this apartment does not have any amenities, but is close to plenty of great restaurants and bars.
top_amenity_gaps: Access to a 24/7 gym or fitness centre
In-apartment entertainment options, such as Netflix or a PlayStation
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living room should be the cover photo, as it showcases the apartment's best feature - the skyline views.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is only +£2.8 vs the cohort median, yet occupancy is a low 15.2% - a strong opportunity to increase revenue (£2,678 at stake from 76 open nights)
No photos or descriptions of the apartment's best feature - the skyline views - are included in the existing description
0-year hosting veteran with no average rating - a potential trust issue for guests
analysis.outreach_hook: I noticed 76 open nights on your calendar at a nightly rate of £177.8, which only beats the cohort median by +£2.8, while your occupancy is significantly lower than the median - a huge opportunity to increase revenue.
